message.content:
Test file: src/game-of-life.spec.ts
Implementation file: src/game-of-life.ts
Passing tests: 5
Recent changes: Added overpopulation logic - cell [1, 1] dies if it has 4 neighbors, survives if it has 2-3 neighbors.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to next test after completion.

content.text: I'll conduct the Refactor phase for the passing tests. Let me start by examining the current code structure and test status.
Now let me verify the tests are passing:

content.text: The refactoring broke tests because my new implementation was too general - it applies survival rules to all cells, but the current tests expect only specific cells to survive. I need to revert to a version that keeps tests green while improving clarity.
